settings.title: Settings
settings.offlineNote: Your language choice is saved on this device and the app continues to work offline.

updates.availableDescription: A newer version of Galerows is available on the Play Store.
updates.downloadedDescription: Restart the app to install the new version.

premium.title: Premium
premium.heroDescription: Subscribe for {{price}}/month and remove ads from Galerows.
premium.activeDescription: Your subscription is active. Ads stay hidden while premium is valid.

benefits.noAds: No banners, ad cards, or ad screens.

premium.unavailable: Subscriptions are available in the app installed from Google Play or the App Store after RevenueCat is configured.
premium.legal: Premium costs {{price}} per month, renews automatically through the store, and can be canceled in your Google Play or Apple ID account settings. The purchase removes ads; it does not add extra content in this version.

errors.generic: We could not complete the operation. Please try again.
errors.unavailable: The subscription is not available in this environment yet.
